# [pixi](../../pixi.md) [global](../global.md) shell-init

Configure your shell to put the pixi global bin directory on PATH

--8<-- "docs/reference/cli/pixi/global/shell-init_extender:description"

## Usage
```
pixi global shell-init [OPTIONS]
```

## Options
- <a id="arg---shell" href="#arg---shell">`--shell (-s) <SHELL>`</a>
:  The shell to configure. Detected automatically if not specified, using the parent process, then $SHELL, then the system default
- <a id="arg---print" href="#arg---print">`--print`</a>
:  Print the shell snippet to stdout instead of modifying config files
- <a id="arg---force" href="#arg---force">`--force`</a>
:  Overwrite an existing pixi PATH configuration. Useful if the bin directory has changed

--8<-- "docs/reference/cli/pixi/global/shell-init_extender:example"
